ads.description: Selling my Original Konami Time Pilot Arcade PCB Board. I bought this from eBay about a year ago and just never ended up using it. I did connect and test it, see pics, and it worked with no issues. Please refer to the pictures for condition. I am not responsible for any damage incurred when plugging this in due to the fragile nature of an over-40-year-old arcade PCB. Even though this board is working and has been tested, I am selling this as used, secondhand, and 'untested.' This is a NON JAMMA board. If you are buying an arcade PCB, then I assume you know how to connect it, if you don’t, please do not buy this. Asking $200 Cash and can meet you either in the parking lot at Big Lots in Milton, or the parking lot at Dick's Sporting Goods in Pace.

ads.author: Joshua Brown
ads.title: Vintage and modern pop culture pin collection on cord board
ads.description: This is a comprehensive collection of over 80 pins and badges presented on a wooden-framed cork board. The collection is a treasure trove for pop culture enthusiasts, featuring a diverse range of themes including classic horror movies (Frankenstein, The Invisible Man), modern animation (Rick and Morty, Dragon Ball), and retro brands like RadioShack. The set includes a mix of traditional round button pins and more detailed enamel lapel pins. Notable pieces include a large artistic sugar skull pin, 'Mars Attacks' motifs, and various convention-specific items like a 'Dragon Con' pin. This curated assembly offers a high variety of aesthetics from vintage 1980s-inspired horror to contemporary Y2K and modern-day icons, making it an excellent starter kit for a new collector or a valuable bulk addition for an experienced reseller. The pins appear to be in good functional condition, securely mounted on a sturdy board.

ads.author: Sara N Martinez
ads.title: Nex playground
ads.description: GET MOVING WITH ACTIVE FAMILY FUN. Nex Playground is a new kind of video game console that gets your family moving. It easily connects to your TV, transforming your living room into an active play space. Within minutes, your family will be playing Fruit Ninja, Whac-a-Mole and more. Using a built-in camera to track motion and natural body movements, anyone in the family can jump right in. JUST USE YOUR BODY TO PLAY. Play naturally just by moving your body. Playground uses the magic of AI to follow your movements using the built-in wide-angle camera. No controllers or clunky trackers! Up to 4 players can play at the same time, so everyone can get moving together. GAMES YOU'LL LOVE MOVING TO. Playground is packed with interactive motion games, turning your living room into an arcade, theme park, gym, and more. There is something for everyone. It is perfect for indoor family game night, after school activities, or a playdate with friends. EASY SET UP. Playground connects to your TV or projector with a simple HDMI connection and gets everyone in on the fun. It's small and sits elegantly on any console or mantle, and can easily fit in a backpack for playdates and more. From ages 5 and up—Playground is the life of every party. SAFE FOR KIDS AND FAMILIES. Playground content is safe and appropriate for all ages. No ads. No in-app purchases. No mature content. Playground is also kidSAFE+ COPPA certified and motion tracking data is never stored or processed in the cloud.

ads.author: Glenda Singletary
ads.title: (PENDING) Arcade
ads.description: Arcade Cabinet – Mortal Kombat / Golden Tee Conversion with 96-in-1 MAME Board Selling an arcade cabinet project. This cabinet originally appears to have been a Mortal Kombat I cabinet that was later converted by a coin-op operator into a Golden Tee machine, likely around 2000/2001. The Golden Tee board has since been removed and replaced with a 96-in-1 MAME-style arcade board. The Golden Tee control panel was removed and replaced with an original Mortal Kombat-style control panel, making it a great candidate for someone who wants a classic fighting-game layout. The current board includes a large selection of well-known arcade titles, including: Pac-Man, Dig Dug, Metal Slug, Street Fighter, and many others. No key for coin slot. The cabinet powers on and has the multi-game board installed, but the control panel needs to be wired back in. Some of the wiring came loose during transport, so this is being sold as a project or fixer-upper for someone comfortable with arcade wiring. Great cabinet for a collector, arcade hobbyist, arcade, game room, or someone wanting to restore/customize a classic cabinet. Condition: Project cabinet / needs control panel wiring / no key. Includes: Cabinet, monitor, 96-in-1 arcade board, Mortal Kombat-style control panel Sold as-is. Buyer responsible for pickup/loading.

ads.author: Allie Biess Benso
ads.title: Classic Pinball Machine
ads.description: Williams Darling (1973) is a classic two-player, electromechanical (EM) pinball machine designed by Steve Kordek, with retro art by Christian Marche. It is highly notable for its central looping "captive ball" mechanism, robust DC-powered pop bumpers, and unique lower playfield slingshot shooters. NOTE- Buyer must move from 2nd story home.

ads.author: Donald Hopkins
ads.title: Arcade Games sign
ads.description: This is a one of a kind, 80s style arcade games sign. It is lighted internally and externally, as you can see. It is 6 feet long by 30 inches tall by 7 inches thick. I would guess it weighs about sixty pounds. It's made out of wood and plastic. Comes with about 10 extra new bulbs. I bought it from a prop house in Atlanta a few years ago. It was used in a movie but I am unsure which one. It's a really well built, cool, unique sign that would look awesome in a retro arcade or mancave. No shipping sorry... pick up only in lithia springs georgia.

Custom aluminum gun bace cover the plastic ones are always broken or missing. New chrome t molding.Made a custom black vinyl cover on the purple plastic were a hole was punched into it. Unfortunately the marquee top was missing when I inquired the machine and couldn’t source one.

ads.author: Noel Hernandez
ads.title: Vintage Eagle Two In One Cocktail Arcade Cabinet
ads.description: Vintage cocktail-style arcade cabinet with a wooden exterior and glass top. This unit has a built-in CRT monitor and internal electronic components including a power supply and circuit boards. The control panel features a joystick and multiple push buttons. It includes original Japanese instruction labels and diagrams. Project Selling a vintage Japanese arcade cabinet believed to be an original Nichibutsu (Japanese manufacturer) machine. Cabinet appears complete with original CRT monitor, wiring, boards, and Japanese instruction sheet still inside. This is an older import cabinet and is being sold as-is. I have not fully tested it, so consider it a restoration or collector project. The cabinet is in original condition and would make a great addition for an arcade collector, vintage gaming enthusiast, or restoration hobbyist. Features:• Original CRT monitor• Original arcade boards and wiring• Japanese documentation included• Rare vintage Japanese import cabinet• Sold as-is These older Japanese cabinets are getting harder to find, especially in largely original condition. Asking $900 OBO.
